# {data-menu-title="QR Code"}

::: {layout="[55,45]"}

::: {.cell}

<img
  alt="QR code linking to this talk's web page."
  src="https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?data=https://paddyroddy.github.io/talks/{{< meta slug >}}&amp;bgcolor=000000&amp;color=ffffff&amp;size=550x550"
  style="display:block;margin:auto;width:550px;"
/>

:::

::: {.cell}

<https://paddyroddy.github.io/talks>

:::

:::
